Description: The top rallycross class (RX1), formerly known as RX Supercar. Equipped with an H4DPF 2.0 L inline-4 engine, a 4-bar anti-lag turbo with a 45 mm restrictor, a mechanical center LSD with a hydraulic shaft/clutch-disengage mechanism, and a 6-speed sequential gearbox. RX1 spec provides around 290 mm of damper travel and 320 mm brake discs.
